sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95281" key="skula/keuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῠλᾰ´κ-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n95281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whelp, cub</tr_>, contemptuously of a boy, Epigr. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.241a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope> </bibl> (Inscr. Cyzic.).</sense> </entryFree>
